scenarios.title: Geographic Risk Transfer
scenarios.description: Inbound wire from a high-risk or blocked country to a domestic customer.

scenarios.title: High Value Outbound
scenarios.description: Single outbound transfer above the EUR threshold.

scenarios.title: Smurfing (Structured Payments)
scenarios.description: Series of small FAST payments below reporting thresholds within a week.

scenarios.title: Daily Velocity Burst
scenarios.description: Rapid burst of outbound transactions exceeding daily velocity limits.

scenarios.title: Weekly Volume Buildup
scenarios.description: Gradual buildup of outbound volume to exceed weekly EUR limits.

scenarios.title: Monthly Peer Anomaly
scenarios.description: Unusually high monthly transaction count versus peer baseline.

scenarios.title: Dormant Account Reactivation
scenarios.description: Large activity on a customer marked dormant after prolonged inactivity.

scenarios.title: Mule Inbound Collection
scenarios.description: Multiple distinct external senders transferring to the same receiver within 24h.
